indicators.name: Large potted plant
indicators.rationale: The large potted plant obstructs the space and makes it difficult to move around freely.

indicators.name: White walls
indicators.rationale: The white walls provide a clean and minimalistic backdrop, which can help in focusing on the practice.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga/stretching due to the obstruction caused by the large potted plant, but the clean and minimalistic environment can be beneficial for concentration.
